title: Tax centres - Canada.ca
content:
To protect your sensitive information and make sure your tax return gets to the CRA quickly and securely, you're strongly encouraged to:
- file your tax return online using NETFILE .
- mail your paper returns to the appropriate tax centre.
You're also strongly encouraged to make a payment to the CRA in one of the following ways:
- pay electronically through your financial institution's Internet or telephone banking service or by setting up pre-authorized debit
- take your remittance voucher and pay directly at a financial institution
- make an electronic payment
You may be able to pay in person at any Canada Post outlet using cash or debit card.
If you need help filing your income tax and benefit return, our Get ready to do your taxes page has everything you need.
Note: There is no walk-in counter service offered at these  locations

## Jonquière Tax Centre
Mailing address for all correspondence: 2251 René-Lévesque Boulevard Jonquière QC  G7S 5J2
Fax number: 418-548-0846
Mailing address for income tax and benefit returns: 1050 Notre Dame Avenue Sudbury ON  P3A 5C2
Mailing address for all other correspondence: Post Office Box 20000, Station A Sudbury ON  P3A 5C1
Fax number: 705-671-3994 and 1-855-276-1529

## Prince Edward Island Tax Centre
Mailing address for all correspondence: 275 Pope Road Summerside PE  C1N 6A2
Mailing address for income tax and benefit returns: Post Office Box 14001, Station Main Winnipeg MB R3C 3M3
Mailing address for all other correspondence: Post Office Box 14000, Station Main Winnipeg MB  R3C 3M2
Courier address (delivery only): 66 Stapon Road Winnipeg MB  R3C 3M2
Fax number: 204-984-5164

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
